# OSHA Compliance MCP Server

Pay-per-call API for OSHA safety regulation lookups.

## Endpoint

```
POST https://osha-mcp.vercel.app/api/lookup
```

## Authentication

This endpoint requires payment via x402 protocol. Include the payment header:
- `x402-payment: <payment>`
- Price: $0.01 per call

Without payment, returns HTTP 402 with payment instructions.

## Tools

### lookup_standard
Search OSHA standards by topic, keyword, or standard number.

```json
{
  "tool": "lookup_standard",
  "query": "fall protection"
}
```

Response includes: standard_number, title, subpart, scope, plain_summary, key_requirements, ppe_requirements, ecfr_url.

### get_ppe_requirements
Get required PPE for a task or hazard.

```json
{
  "tool": "get_ppe_requirements",
  "query": "overhead welding"
}
```

### get_penalty_info
Get current OSHA penalty amounts by violation type.

```json
{
  "tool": "get_penalty_info",
  "violation_type": "serious"
}
```

Violation types: serious, other_than_serious, willful, repeat, failure_to_abate, posting_requirements, all.

### check_applicability
Determine which OSHA standards apply to an industry or task.

```json
{
  "tool": "check_applicability",
  "query": "residential construction"
}
```

### get_standard_text
Get full regulatory text for a specific standard.

```json
{
  "tool": "get_standard_text",
  "standard_number": "1910.134"
}
```

## Coverage

- 29 CFR 1910 (General Industry): 188 standards
- 29 CFR 1926 (Construction): 291 standards
- 479 total standards with plain-English summaries

## Pricing

$0.01 per API call via x402 protocol (Base network).

Receiving wallet: 0x0b55C77eDC2592e38eBd008F82Cce694d3c49475

## Disclaimer

This tool is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. Always verify requirements with official OSHA sources at osha.gov.
